biography_short: Hijo y sucesor de Pelayo que accedió al trono tras la muerte de su padre; las fuentes ofrecen datos limitados sobre su reinado.

visual_profile.clothing: short royal mantle, less ornate than later monarchs
visual_profile.style_notes: brief reign visualized as a transitional figure between Pelayo and later rulers; modest regalia.

must_keep: Very limited narrative presence in the source
must_avoid: Attributing a long or well-documented reign beyond what the sources state

emotional_state.trigger_summary: Inherited sudden responsibility after Pelayo's death; sparse records produce an aura of fragility.

arc_state.contradiction: lack of recorded achievements vs. dynastic expectations
arc_state.change_vector: brief rulership, followed by early death or disappearance from records
